title: strychnos grayi
intro: Strychnos grayi is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, commonly known as the poison tree due to its toxic properties. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been observed to have various health benefits such as pain relief, reduced inflammation, and the treatment of digestive issues. Traditionally, Strychnos grayi has been used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are taken orally to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. However, due to its toxicity, the plant should be handled with caution and only under the guidance of a medical professional or experienced herbalist.
